summary: Comprehensive backend testing of ONYX PySide6 desktop AI chat assistant - Iteration 2. All 119 pytest tests pass (1 skipped for PyAudio in container). All 9 original tests pass. Verified all new features: ToolService (shell/file/dir tools), 9 Anthropic models with model switching, streaming responses, file attachments, system tray, compact mode, wake word thread, new humanoid robot icon, and all config files.

minor.issue: AGENT_BG was used but not imported - FIXED by adding to imports

critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly: ToolService with shell/file/dir tools, 9 Anthropic models, streaming, attachments, system tray, compact mode, wake word
Code quality is good - proper error handling, graceful degradation when audio/TTS unavailable
Fixed missing AGENT_BG import in chat_widget.py
Minor unused imports in main.py (os, asyncio, Qt) - cosmetic only
SVG icon has proper humanoid robot design with head, eyes, shoulders - not a box head
settings.json default model is claude-sonnet-4-6 as required

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Desktop app, no web frontend

seed_data_creation: None - tests use temporary directories and clean up after themselves
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a PySide6 desktop application, NOT a web app. Testing is done via Python imports and script execution. The comprehensive test suites at /app/backend/tests/test_onyx_services.py and /app/backend/tests/test_onyx_iteration2.py cover all services. CLAUDE_API_KEY is intentionally blank - the app handles missing key gracefully. PyAudio and TTS may not work in container (no audio hardware/espeak-ng) but code handles this gracefully.

features_verified.imports: All Python imports work (PySide6, emergentintegrations, pyttsx3, whisper, torch, dotenv)
features_verified.tool_service: parse_tool_calls extracts shell/read_file/write_file/list_dir, run_shell executes commands, read_file reads, write_file writes, list_dir lists, strip_tool_tags cleans response
features_verified.chat_service: 9 Anthropic models listed, model switching works, switch_chat creates fresh session, reload_config works, _build_contextual_message includes history
features_verified.tts_service: toggle enabled/disabled works, settings persistence to settings.json works
features_verified.voice_service: WakeWordThread class exists with wake_word_detected signal, transcribe_sync method exists
features_verified.chat_widget: has model QComboBox, TTS checkbox, wake word checkbox, attach button, streaming timer logic, tool_output signal handler, ChatThread emits tool_output signal
features_verified.main_window: has QSystemTrayIcon init, compact toggle button, closeEvent minimizes to tray, context menu on chat list
features_verified.styles: has USER_MSG_HTML, AGENT_MSG_HTML, TOOL_MSG_HTML, TYPING_INDICATOR_HTML, ATTACHMENT_HTML templates with distinct colors
features_verified.icon: install/onyx_icon.svg exists with humanoid robot (head, eyes, shoulders), install/onyx_icon.png exists (29148 bytes)
features_verified.config_files: knowledgebase.txt, user.txt, instructions.txt, personality.txt, settings.json all exist with helpful comments
features_verified.security: No dummy_key or placeholder API keys in code
